candidate_outcome: The hypothesis is that the coefficients on the interaction terms will be negative at the extreme temperature categories. A negative coefficient would be interpreted as evidence that the diffusion of a particular modifier reduced a population’s vulnerability to temperature extremes, relative to the modifier’s effect on the mortality impact of days in the 60F–69F range.
